settings.text: Find quick answers regarding our operations, shipping, and product warranties.

settings.question: Does Montana support bulk orders for schools or offices?
settings.answer: Yes, we offer special pricing for high-volume purchases (B2B). Please contact us via the form above or WhatsApp to discuss your needs.

settings.question: What is your shipping policy?
settings.answer: Orders are processed on business days (Monday - Friday). We ship nationwide via our official courier and marketplace partners.

settings.question: Is there a warranty if I receive a damaged product?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Your satisfaction is our priority. If you receive a defective or damaged item, you may request a return within 3 days of receipt by providing an unboxing video.
